original_prompt: Perform a security audit on test_ash.py, identify potential vulnerabilities, and suggest/apply fixes.

tasks.title: Read test_ash.py to analyze code for vulnerabilities
tasks.description: Inspect scratch/test_ash.py to identify security issues such as hardcoded secrets, unsafe URL usage, improper error handling, or missing input validation.

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded API key with environment variable
tasks.description: Update the test script to load the Authorization header value from an environment variable (e.g., ASHBORN_API_KEY) instead of using 'your-api-key-here'. Use os.getenv() to retrieve it.

tasks.title: Add input validation for URL and payload
tasks.description: In send_completion_request(), validate that url is a non-empty string and uses https:// scheme. Validate payload is a dict and contains expected keys like 'prompt' and 'max_tokens'.

tasks.title: Improve error handling to avoid information leakage
tasks.description: Replace print() statements in exception handlers with logging or generic error messages to prevent leaking sensitive info. Ensure exceptions are re-raised appropriately.

tasks.title: Create .env file with placeholder API key
tasks.description: Create a .env file in the project root containing ASHBORN_API_KEY=your-api-key-here (do not commit real keys). This serves as documentation for required environment variables.
